name: TestWaitForDiagKLineByteTransmitted
title: TestWaitForDiagKLineByteTransmitted
syntax: long TestWaitForDiagKLineByteTransmitted(char ecuQualifier[], dword timeout_ms); // form 2
description: Waits for the occurrence of a transmitted byte. Should the byte not occur before the expiration of the time timeout_ms, the wait condition is resolved nevertheless.

parameters.name: timeout_ms
parameters.description: Maximum time that should be waited [ms] (Transmission of 0: no timeout controlling)

parameters.name: ecuQualifier
parameters.description: Qualifier of the ECU or target as set in the diagnostic configuration dialog for the respective diagnostic description.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
